---
title: "`r params$title`"
output:
  html_document:
    self_contained: true
  pdf_document:
    latex_engine: pdflatex
params:
  title:        "Scenario report"
  scen_name:    ""
  scen_desc:    ""
  status_df:    NULL
  gen_plot:     NULL
  gen_day_plot: NULL
  cap_plot:     NULL
  newcap_plot:  NULL
  emis_df:      NULL
  cost_df:      NULL
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)
library(ggplot2)
kb <- function(df, ...) if (!is.null(df) && nrow(df) > 0) knitr::kable(df, row.names = FALSE, ...)
```

`r if (isTRUE(nzchar(params$scen_desc))) params$scen_desc`

## Overview

```{r status}
kb(params$status_df)
```

## Generation

```{r gen, fig.width=8, fig.height=4.5, eval=!is.null(params$gen_plot)}
params$gen_plot
```

```{r gen-day, fig.width=8, fig.height=4.5, eval=!is.null(params$gen_day_plot)}
params$gen_day_plot
```

## Capacity

```{r cap, fig.width=8, fig.height=4.5, eval=!is.null(params$cap_plot)}
params$cap_plot
```

```{r newcap, fig.width=8, fig.height=4.5, eval=!is.null(params$newcap_plot)}
params$newcap_plot
```

```{r emis-header, results='asis', eval=!is.null(params$emis_df)}
cat("## Emissions\n")
```

```{r emis}
kb(params$emis_df)
```

```{r cost-header, results='asis', eval=!is.null(params$cost_df)}
cat("## Costs\n")
```

```{r cost}
kb(params$cost_df)
```
